entity.summary: Order-book decentralized exchange built into Binance Chain, later renamed BNB Beacon Chain, and launched in April 2019. The native DEX module was deliberately decommissioned under BEP-151 after usage and liquidity shifted toward BNB Smart Chain AMMs. BNB Beacon Chain then stopped processing new transactions in its final sunset on November 19, 2024.
entity.notes: HEI models Binance DEX as a separate historical exchange entity because it was a distinct on-chain order-book venue rather than a Binance.com market screen. BEP-151 disabled the DEX module before the full Beacon Chain sunset; HEI uses 2024-11-19 as the conservative definitive terminal marker because the underlying chain stopped processing new transactions on that date.

events.title: Binance DEX launched on Binance Chain
events.description: Binance DEX became publicly available as the native order-book decentralized exchange on Binance Chain.
events.notes: The exchange launch followed the Binance Chain mainnet release and BNB mainnet migration.

events.title: Binance DEX reached its terminal state with the Beacon Chain sunset
events.description: After BEP-151 decommissioned the native DEX module, BNB Beacon Chain halted and stopped processing new transactions in the final sunset fork.
events.notes: The DEX module had already been disabled under BEP-151. The final chain halt provides a definitive terminal marker even though decommissioning occurred earlier.

evidence.title: Binance Smart Chain Mainnet Launch
evidence.notes: Official BNB Chain history identifies Binance DEX as the native decentralized exchange on Binance Chain and states that it launched in April 2019.

evidence.title: Binance decentralized exchange now live on Binance Chain
evidence.notes: Contemporary launch report documenting the April 23 public launch.

evidence.title: BEP-151: Decommission Decentralized Exchange on BNB Beacon Chain
evidence.notes: Implemented protocol proposal states that the built-in DEX would be decommissioned, new orders and listings disabled, and existing orders canceled or timed out.

evidence.title: Final Sunset plan of BNB Beacon Chain
evidence.notes: Official final-sunset announcement states that BNB Beacon Chain would halt and stop processing new transactions at the November 19, 2024 fork.
